title: BerkaruFPS
description: A modpack that allows you to get the best performance for Low or Medium systems
body:
**New releases coming soon!**

**Our Target**

Ensuring you get the highest performance by removing unnecessary plugins

**Why You Should Choose Us**

BerkaruFPS eliminates the redundancy in many fps modpacks and complements their shortcomings, giving you the best fps and performance to enjoy your gaming experience.

**Made With Fabric**

Made with fabric loader for light weight and best performance

**FPS Test**

Minecraft Settings: High Settings Chunk 12

**Optifine:**![Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28783772405b8af50d5af4be8f67700906cc33de.png)

**BerkaruFPS:**![BerkaruFPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f355ca18efca76867ebab093cd5c4d5ea88d8e16.png)

**Tested with:**

CPU:Ryzen 5 3600X

GPU:SAPPHIRE PULSE Radeon RX 580 8GB

RAM:Kingston Fury Beast 8 GB 3200 MHz

**May perform better on better or worse computers**
